_comment: 30-day medians sourced from published 2023–2024 transit data (Suez Canal Authority, Panama Canal Authority, EIA, Lloyd's List). Used as 'expected' baseline — live metrics are expressed as a delta vs this number.

suez.notes: Daily convoy-system crossing. Baseline from 2023 SCA figures (~18k/yr).

panama.notes: Lock-throughput limited. 2023 drought compressed daily slots from 38 → 24; this baseline is pre-drought median.

hormuz.notes: ~20M bpd of oil; open seaway so dwell is short.

malacca.notes: ~90k/yr including feeders; long strait so dwell is ~20h end-to-end.

bosphorus.notes: TSS-controlled with weather/current delays; queue often significant.

bab-el-mandeb.notes: Yemen Red Sea risk since 2023 has depressed this vs. historical ~85/day.

dover.notes: TSS-controlled; includes cross-channel ferries + commercial shipping.

cape-of-good-hope.notes: Reroute spike during Red Sea disruption — was ~90/day pre-2024.
